exercises.title: FizzBuzz
exercises.instructions:
Print numbers 1 to 20.
- If divisible by 3, print "Fizz" instead.
- If divisible by 5, print "Buzz" instead.
- If divisible by both 3 and 5, print "FizzBuzz".
exercises.expected_output:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz
16
17
Fizz
19
Buzz
exercises.hints: Check the FizzBuzz condition first (divisible by both), then Fizz, then Buzz.

exercises.title: What does the array map() method do?

answers.text: Creates a new array by transforming each element
Joins the array into a single string
